title: How to remember the range
summary: German beer is easier to navigate when each style has one clear cue.

bullets.title: Start pale
bullets.body: Use Helles and Pils to learn malt versus hop balance.

bullets.title: Add character
bullets.body: Use Weissbier, Dunkel, and Bock for yeast, malt, and strength.

bullets.title: Go regional
bullets.body: Use Kolsch, Altbier, Rauchbier, and Kellerbier for range.

resources.title: Question
resources.body: Is malt, hops, yeast, smoke, or strength leading?

resources.title: Shortcut
resources.body: Order a Helles first when you need a baseline.
